'''Kyakhta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ansionian]] enforcer for [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin|Soergg]]. He had ragged red [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and had a crude prosthetic to replace his missing right [[Limb/Legends|arm]]. He was an [[Alwari]] who had been cast out from his [[Tasbir]] clan to the cities as a child due to his mental illness.<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Kyakhta worked with another Ansionian named [[Bulgan]] to kidnap [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]], but instead aided her after she cured his and his companion's mental illnesses. After being cured, Kyakhta and Bulgan joined Barriss and her Jedi comrades in [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|their search]] for the [[Borokii]] overclan, in a bid to prevent Ansion's [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|secession]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />
